title: Diagnose Cloud Run cold starts and latency
description: Separate scheduling cold start, container init time, and CPU-throttling-during-startup using request logs and the startup CPU boost.
body: Use when Cloud Run requests have intermittent high latency. Do not jump straight to raising maxScale. Actions: check request logs for the cold-start flag, measure container startup time (image pull + app init), enable startup CPU boost to speed init, set minScale to keep instances warm, and confirm CPU is allocated during startup. Validation signals include the cold-start rate dropping after minScale, startup latency falling with CPU boost, and p99 stabilizing under steady load. Risk boundary: changing production scaling or revision traffic split is human-gated.
